title: wedelia hintoniorum
intro: Wedelia hintoniorum, also known as Wedelia, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow or orange flowers and fragrant, minty leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia hintoniorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish.
